placeholderManageStack: Tell AI to manage your stack...
noTransitRoutes: No transit routes found for this itinerary.
hostingLocalDescription: Keep everything on this device with no sync dependency.
hostingOfficialDescription: Use the managed HStack cloud to keep your stack available everywhere.
hostingCustomDescription: Connect this app to your own HStack Lite deployment.
customServerHint: Saved when the field loses focus. Point this to your HStack Lite base URL.
signInManagedCloud: Sign in to the managed HStack cloud, or create an account for it.
signInSelfHosted: Sign in to your HStack Lite server, or create an account on it.
officialCloudUnavailable: Official cloud is not configured in this build yet. Set VITE_OFFICIAL_CLOUD_URL once the hosted deployment is ready.
enterServerBeforeSignIn: Enter your HStack Lite base URL above before trying to sign in.
syncKeychainHint: The sync token lives in the OS keychain. Changing hosting mode or server URL clears the active remote session.
voiceModeDisabledDescription: Hide voice input and keep the composer text-only.
voiceModeAutoDescription: Enable voice only when your signed-in account has managed voice access. This does not fall back to a local key.
voiceModeDirectDescription: Use your own speech provider key locally. This mode is explicit and independent from managed access.
managedVoiceHint: Managed voice availability is confirmed by the private backend after sign-in.
localeAppliesImmediately: Changes apply immediately to ticket date and time formatting
apiKeysSecurity: API keys are securely stored in your OS Keychain (Hardware Encrypted) and never written to disk in plaintext.
enterGeminiApiKeyFirst: Enter a Gemini API key first
geminiEndpointHint: Gemini uses the Google models.list endpoint directly. No custom endpoint is needed.
setupQuestion: How should HStack host your data?
setupDescription: Pick a mode now. You can switch later in settings.
signInOfficialCloudDescription: Use your HStack account to sync through the managed cloud.
connectSelfHostedDescription: Point this build at your HStack Lite base URL, then sign in or create an account.
officialCloudNotReady: Official cloud is not configured in this build yet. Set VITE_OFFICIAL_CLOUD_URL when the hosted deployment is ready.
enterValidBaseUrl: Enter a valid HStack Lite base URL before continuing.
officialCloudKeychainHint: Your sync session is stored in the OS keychain and can be cleared later in settings.
selfHostedKeychainHint: Use the HStack Lite base URL. The token is stored in the OS keychain after sign-in.
credentialsChangedLater: Credentials can be changed later in settings
setupLocalDescription: Everything stays on this device. No account or internet required.
enterValidServerUrl: Enter a valid HStack Lite server URL before continuing.
remoteAuthFailed: Failed to authenticate against the remote server.
